label: Clerk Authentication
summary: Drop-in user authentication via Clerk. Adds the <ClerkProvider /> wrapper for the root layout, a Next.js middleware that protects routes, and pre-built <SignInButton /> / <UserButton /> UI primitives. Use when the brief asks for login, signup, accounts, gated dashboards, or 'a way for users to log in'. The middleware file MUST stay verbatim — Clerk's matcher syntax and route ordering are load-bearing for session resolution.

envVars.purpose: Server-side Clerk API authentication. Clerk dashboard → API Keys → Secret keys (sk_test_/sk_live_). Tagged 'build' because the middleware reads this at module init; a missing value crashes every request through the middleware.

Client-side Clerk SDK init. Clerk dashboard → API Keys → Publishable keys (pk_test_/pk_live_). Tagged 'build' because <ClerkProvider> throws synchronously on mount when missing, black-screening the whole app.
Optional override for the sign-in route path. Defaults to '/sign-in' when unset. Only set this if the project mounts the Clerk sign-in component on a non-default path (e.g. '/login').
Optional override for the sign-up route path. Defaults to '/sign-up' when unset. Only set this if the project uses a different signup path (e.g. '/register').
